effective_at_lower_bound.description: The inclusive lower bound of the effective_at timestamp for the returned balances.

effective_at_upper_bound.description: The exclusive upper bound of the effective_at timestamp for the returned balances.

pending_balance.description: The pending_balance is the sum of all pending and posted entries.

posted_balance.description: The posted_balance is the sum of all posted entries.

available_balance.description: The available_balance is the sum of all posted inbound entries and pending outbound entries. For credit normal, available_amount = posted_credits - pending_debits; for debit normal, available_amount = posted_debits - pending_credits.
